query:
SELECT 
  u.id as userId, u.name, u.email,
  up.assignedBusinessLines, up.assignedStates, up.assignedSectors
FROM users u
JOIN userProfiles up ON up.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Brett%' OR u.name LIKE '%Dan%' OR u.name LIKE '%Hansen%' OR u.name LIKE '%Day%'
ORDER BY u.name;
